title: AtmosphericSurvival
description: Atmosphere modpack for improving survival in Singleplayer or Multiplayer
body:
A simple Minecraft modpack focusing on survival enhancements. This modpack makes survival more atmospheric by adding sounds, also this modpack includes mods that make survivial more comfortable and easier.


<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers

- AmbientSounds

- AppleSkin

- Architectury API

- Balm

- Better F3

- Bookshelf

- Chat Heads

- Cloth Config API

- Clumps

- CreativeCore

- Cull Leaves

- Embeddium

- Enchantment Descriptions

- Entity Culling

- Experimental Settings Disabler

- HT's TreeChop

- Jade

- JourneyMap

- NetherPortalFix

- Oculus

- Puzzles Lib

- REI

- Sound Physics Remastered

- Visual Workbench

- YUNG's API

- YUNG's Better Mineshafts

- YUNG's Better Strongholds

- spark
</details>

You can use this modpack as a base for other modpacks and modify it with providing the author.
